understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by positioning every selectable piece (P or S) onto a unique goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level's grid to achieve WIN, with only 1 selectable per goal allowed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell in the direction unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable blocks (B) can be shoved if adjacent; CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S becomes P) at exact pixel coordinates like [x,y]; multiple selectables require switching and precise positioning to cover all + goals at once, with limited steps per level.
